title: Blackspur BB-WR285 Socket Set
features: Heat treated and hardened carbon steel
Supplied in a moulded carry case
description: Product Description Blackspur comprehensive set of SAE and metric drive sockets and reversible ratchets is securely packed in a moulded carry case. 3/8" and 1/2"drive ratchet handles. 12 x 1/4" Drive 6pt sockets 5/32"-1/2". 12 x 1/4" Drive 6pt sockets 4-13mm. 3 x 1/4" Drive 8pt sockets 1/4", 5/16" and 3/8", 1/4" Drive 6" spinner handle. 1/4"-3/8" Drive adaptor. 3/8" x 5" extension bar. 3/8" spin disc. 10 and 16mm spark plug sockets. 3 x 3/8" Drive 6pt sockets 14, 16 and 17mm. 3 x 3/8" Drive 6pt sockets 9/16", 11/16" and 3/4". 10 x 1/2" Drive 6pt sockets 10-22mm. Supplying quality products. One of the most comprehensive ranges of hand tools and DIY associated products in the UK. Box Contains 52x Socket Set
